Name: users
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root")), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "users" LIMIT 2) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.base"."id", 'displayName', "_root.base"."display_name", 'departments', (SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root.r.departments")), '[]') AS "departments" FROM (WITH "_root.r.departments.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "user_departments" WHERE "user_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 3) SELECT json_object('department', (WITH "_root.r.departments.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "departments" WHERE "_root.r.departments.base"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.r.departments.r.department.base"."id", 'name', "_root.r.departments.r.department.base"."name", 'files', (SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files")), '[]') AS "files" FROM (WITH "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.r.departments.r.department.base"."id" LIMIT 5) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files.base"."id", 'description', "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files.base"."description") AS "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files" FROM "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files.base") AS "_root.r.departments.r.department.r.files")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.departments.r.department.base")) AS "_root.r.departments" FROM "_root.r.departments.base") AS "_root.r.departments")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
